extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNISSEN Mike retained yellow as JUMBO-VISMA crushed the 27.6km Brussels TTT, beating INEOS by 20 seconds with MARTIN powering the effort.
tactical_patterns: INEOS set early benchmark at 29:18 but suffered from starting first in hot conditions, losing 20 seconds.
JUMBO-VISMA 14 seconds up at intermediate check, maintained pacing strategy through second half where others faded.
KATUSHA surprisingly competitive with DOWSETT and POLITT showing unexpected TTT strength, just 5 seconds off INEOS.
DECEUNINCK-QUICKSTEP lost world champion form, only 0.82 seconds faster than INEOS despite being motivated post-stage 1 disappointment.

rider_signals.MARTIN Tony: positive: anchored JUMBO-VISMA's dominant performance, keeping 5 riders together to finish despite being specialist domestique
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: positive: stayed with JUMBO-VISMA group to finish, GC rider gaining massive 20-second buffer over INEOS rivals
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: FDJ only 11 seconds back but crash near finish exposed team's TTT fragility despite recent improvement
rider_signals.QUINTANA Naira: negative: MOVISTAR lost ~1 minute to INEOS, confirming historical TTT weakness remains unchanged despite GC ambitions
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: TREK-SEGAFREDO ~1 minute back, exposing weak support for GC contender in discipline
